text: Thank you for calling Athena Family Medicine, this is the front desk. How can I help you today?
I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth?
Thanks, Maria. What day works best for you?
We have Thursday at 2:30 or 3:45 PM.
Great, I've booked you Thursday at 2:30 PM with Dr. Lee.
Yes, we accept Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO plans.
You're all set. Anything else today?
Perfect. Have a great day, Maria.
